steps.speaker: Satyaki Tirumal
lines: The deeds... the rings... the arguments...
Fine. Keep the harbour. Keep getting larger. SRMT will notice.
There is still no KFC here, which is the only victory I have left.

steps.speaker: Harbour Resident
lines: The rain stopped spelling his name.
Banana-burbs is inland. Everyone there smiles at the same time.
That is not happiness. That is scheduling.
